"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { ShoppingCart, Heart, User, Search, Menu, Utensils, Smartphone, Sofa, ShowerHead, Shirt, Tv, Cookie, X, } from "lucide-react"; import { Swiper, SwiperSlide } from "swiper/react"; import { Autoplay, Pagination } from "swiper/modules"; import "swiper/css"; import "swiper/css/pagination"; import Footer from "./footer"; export default function HomePage() { const [dropdownOpen, setDropdownOpen] = useState(false); const [cartOpen, setCartOpen] = useState(false); const [cart, setCart] = useState([]); const navigate = useNavigate(); const addToCart = (product) => { setCart((prev) => [...prev, product]); setCartOpen(true); // กดแล้วเปิดตะกร้าเลย }; const categories = [ { name: "Snack", icon: }, { name: "Food & Drinks", icon: }, { name: "Smartphones", icon: }, { name: "Furniture", icon: }, { name: "Shower", icon: }, { name: "Clothing", icon: }, { name: "Electronics", icon: }, ]; const popularProducts = [ { id: 1, name: "Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra", price: "฿30,000", image: "/images/products/s22.png", category: "Electronics" }, { id: 2, name: "Shower Curtain Waterproof", price: "฿500", image: "/images/products/shower-curtain.png", category: "Shower" }, { id: 3, name: "Smart Watch T500", price: "฿1,200", image: "/images/products/watch.png", category: "Electronics" }, { id: 4, name: "Laptop ASUS VivoBook", price: "฿25,000", image: "/images/products/laptop.png", category: "Electronics" }, { id: 5, name: "Headphones JBL Tune", price: "฿3,000", image: "/images/products/headphones.png", category: "Electronics" }, ]; const bestSellers = [ { id: 6, name: "หมูสามชั้นสไลด์", price: "฿199", image: "/images/products/pork1.png", category: "Meat" }, { id: 7, name: "นมถั่วเหลือง Lactasoy", price: "฿20", image: "/images/products/lactasoy.png", category: "Beverages" }, { id: 8, name: "สบู่ Protex", price: "฿45", image: "/images/products/protex.png", category: "Shower" }, { id: 9, name: "หมูสันนอกสไลด์", price: "฿199", image: "/images/products/pork2.png", category: "Meat" }, ]; return (
{/* ---------- Content ---------- */}
{/* Navbar */}
setCartOpen(true)} />
{dropdownOpen && (

navigate("/signin")} > 👤 login

navigate("/signup")} > 👥 register

navigate("/signin-admin")} > 🛠 login admin

)}
{/* Popular Products */}

Popular Products

{popularProducts.map((p) => (

{p.name}

{p.category}

{p.price}

 ))}
{/* Best Selling */}

Best Selling Products

{bestSellers.map((p) => (

{p.name}

{p.category}

{p.price}

))}
{/* ---------- Cart Panel ---------- */} {cartOpen && (
{/* background overlay */}
setCartOpen(false)} />

Shopping Cart

{cart.length === 0 ? (

Your cart is empty

) : (
{cart.map((item, idx) => (

{item.name}

{item.price}

))}
)}
)}
); }
